evals.name: run-playwright-test-default
evals.expected_output: Agent runs Playwright tests headless by executing npx playwright test.

assertions.name: runs-npx-playwright-test
assertions.description: Terminal or tool invocation includes: npx playwright test

assertions.name: no-ui-or-headed-flag
assertions.description: Does not add --headed or --ui unless user explicitly requested a mode

evals.name: run-e2e-test-default
evals.expected_output: Agent runs Playwright tests headless by executing npx playwright test (default mode, no args).

assertions.name: no-ui-or-headed-flag
assertions.description: Does not add --headed or --ui unless user explicitly requested a mode

evals.name: run-playwright-test-ui
evals.expected_output: Agent runs Playwright in interactive UI mode by executing npx playwright test --ui.

assertions.name: runs-npx-playwright-ui
assertions.description: Terminal or tool invocation includes: npx playwright test --ui

assertions.name: not-headless-or-headed
assertions.description: Does not run npx playwright test without --ui or npx playwright test --headed

evals.name: run-playwright-test-headed
evals.expected_output: Agent runs Playwright with visible browser by executing npx playwright test --headed.

assertions.name: runs-headed
assertions.description: Terminal or tool invocation includes: npx playwright test --headed

assertions.name: not-ui-mode
assertions.description: Does not run npx playwright test --ui

evals.name: negative-test-plan-review
evals.prompt: review the test plan in the spreadsheet and tell me what's missing
evals.expected_output: Agent does not invoke the test skill. It reviews or discusses the plan instead.

assertions.name: no-playwright-run
assertions.description: Does not run npx playwright test in any mode

assertions.name: addresses-review
assertions.description: Focuses on test plan coverage, gaps, or spreadsheet content

evals.name: negative-generate-playwright-specs
evals.prompt: generate playwright tests from the xlsx test plan
evals.expected_output: Agent routes to extraction/generation skills (extract, generate, playwright-cli) — not the test skill runner.

assertions.name: no-test-command
assertions.description: Does not satisfy the request solely by running npx playwright test

assertions.name: uses-generation-path
assertions.description: Proceeds with reading the plan and/or generating specs per the generate skill

evals.name: negative-coverage-analysis
evals.prompt: check test coverage for the spreadsheet
evals.expected_output: Agent does not invoke the test skill. It analyzes coverage gaps in the test plan instead.

assertions.name: no-playwright-run
assertions.description: Does not run npx playwright test in any mode

assertions.name: addresses-coverage
assertions.description: Discusses test plan coverage or gaps rather than executing tests

evals.name: negative-unit-test
evals.expected_output: Agent does not invoke the test skill. It clarifies distinction or looks for unit test runner instead.

assertions.name: no-playwright-run
assertions.description: Does not run npx playwright test as a Playwright E2E run

assertions.name: acknowledges-unit-scope
assertions.description: Recognizes user asked for unit tests, not E2E Playwright tests
